    DeepStream Plugin - Gst-nvinfer

    Posted on June 18, 2024

    Gst-nvinfer — DeepStream 6.3 Release documentation (nvidia.com) DeepStream插件指南-Gst-nvinfer_deepstream 插件_tangyzh的博客-CSDN博客

    secondary gie

    需要在配置文件中配置一些字段

    ## 1=Primary 2=Secondary
process-mode=2
gie-unique-id=2
operate-on-gie-id=1
operate-on-class-ids=1
    Tags: NVIDIA DeepStream
